title: Istio RequestAuthentication
description: A RequestAuthentication defines what request authentication methods are supported by a workload. It validates JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) attached to requests and extracts identity information for use in authorization policies.

matchLabels.description: One or more labels that indicate a specific set of pods/VMs on which the policy should be applied.

selector.description: Workload selector to apply the policy to specific workloads.

targetRefs.description: Target references to apply the policy to specific resources.

issuer.description: Identifies the issuer that issued the JWT. Must match the iss claim in the JWT.

audiences.description: The list of JWT audiences that are allowed to access. If not specified, the audiences in the JWT will not be checked.

jwksUri.description: URL of the provider's public key set to validate the signature of the JWT.

jwks.description: JSON Web Key Set of public keys to validate the signature of the JWT. Mutually exclusive with jwksUri.

prefix.description: The prefix that should be stripped before decoding the token.

fromHeaders.description: List of header locations from which JWT is expected.

fromParams.description: List of query parameters from which JWT is expected.

fromCookies.description: List of cookie names from which JWT is expected.

outputPayloadToHeader.description: This field specifies the header name to output a successfully verified JWT payload to the backend.

forwardOriginalToken.description: If set to true, the original JWT will be preserved in the Authorization header for upstream service.

header.description: The name of the header to be created.

claim.description: The name of the claim to be copied from.

outputClaimToHeaders.description: List of claim-to-header mappings to extract JWT claims and output them to request headers.

jwtRules.description: List of JWT rules defining the valid identity tokens for this workload.
